title: kohautia subverticillata subsp. subverticillata
intro: Kohautia subverticillata subsp. subverticillata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, also known as the coffee family. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Kohautia subverticillata subsp. subverticillata include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusion, where the leaves and stems are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its benefits.
